## 1. Abstract (摘要)

## 2. Thermodynamic & Economic Impact (热力学与经济学评估)
*Code in Life++ is not free. It is bound by physics and the `LIFE++` tokenomics.*
- [ ] **Proof of Thermal Exhaust (PoTE):** Does this computation exceed the Landauer Limit? How will it be priced in the PoCC consensus?
- [ ] [cite_start]**Daily Netting Mechanism:** How does this impact the Daily Netting mechanism based on alliance chain consensus? [cite: 34] Will it bloat the settlement logic?
- [ ] [cite_start]**Credit Creation:** Does this proposal affect the Life++ Bank's credit scoring model ($S_{cog}$) or the Persona Soulbound Slash mechanism? [cite: 66, 79]

## 3. Edge-Native Hardware Constraints (边缘物理约束)
*Life++ is Edge-Native. [cite_start]Terminals running Agents are physical branches of the Agent Bank[cite: 12].*
- [ ] **Storage Forgetfulness:** Does this change bloat the Cognitive Hash Timeline (CHT) Slicing Storage? [cite_start]Terminals only need to store the transaction hash chains related to their own Persona and the block headers of their allies[cite: 19].
- [ ] [cite_start]**Hardware Compatibility:** Can this modification run within a standard Trusted Execution Environment (TEE)? [cite: 15]
